steps.title: Substitute t = 4 into the equation
steps.content:
The equation $s = 38 + 3t$ gives the speed $s$, in miles per hour, of the van $t$ seconds after it began to accelerate. To find the speed at $t = 4$, substitute:
$$s = 38 + 3(4) = 38 + 12 = 50$$

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: The speed of the van 4 seconds after it began to accelerate is 50 miles per hour. That is the correct answer.
